official_sources.name: NASA LAMBDA ACT DR6.02 pspipe best fits info
official_sources.evidence: file format lists columns l, Dl_TT, Dl_TE, Dl_TB, Dl_ET, Dl_BT, Dl_EE, Dl_EB, Dl_BE, Dl_BB

official_sources.name: ACT DR6 chain/likelihood readme
official_sources.evidence: baseline ACT likelihood uses full multi-frequency MFLike TT+TE+EE likelihood to include foreground models
supports: foreground comparison convention remains a separate promotion blocker

is_cmb_dat_dell_or_cell.basis: official file format declares Dl_* columns

are_sacc_windows_applied_to_dell_or_cell.answer: candidate applies windows to D_ell columns
are_sacc_windows_applied_to_dell_or_cell.basis: official theory columns are Dl_* and materialization applies SACC BandpowerWindow weights over ell 2..8501

are_tt_te_ee_columns_1_2_6_correct.basis: official column order gives Dl_TT at index 1, Dl_TE at index 2, Dl_EE at index 6

is_foreground_or_cmb_only_convention_mis.basis: candidate uses cmb.dat only; full baseline ACT likelihood includes foreground models, so official comparison convention against this 135-row CMB-only SACC still needs a dedicated foreground/cmb-only binding audit

is_135_row_ordering_exact.basis: ordering certificate requires shape [135]; local SACC has 45 cl_00 rows, 45 cl_0e rows, and 45 cl_ee rows with contiguous target ranges 0..44, 45..89, 90..134

passed_conventions: cmb.dat uses D_ell columns, not unlabeled arbitrary columns
TT/TE/EE candidate column mapping 1/2/6 is supported by official file format
SACC bandpower window materialization is numerically reproducible within tolerance
135-row candidate ordering is structurally aligned with ACT CMB-only SACC row blocks
remaining_blockers: promotion decision for whether cmb.dat alone is the official baseline vector for this 135-row comparison
does_not_prove: baseline LCDM prediction vector has been promoted
baseline LCDM prediction vector is final official ACT comparison vector
cmb.dat alone is the final official foreground-aware baseline comparison
ACT DR6 residual eigenspace empirical comparison has been run
